message: Initial commit with task details
feat(js): extract base64 images to files by default, remove --enhanced flag
feat(rust): extract base64 images to files by default, remove --enhanced flag
test: add image extraction tests for JS and Rust, fix formatting
chore: add changeset for minor release and bump Rust version to 0.2.0
style: fix prettier formatting in JS files

Revert "Initial commit with task details"
feat: change default format to markdown, use getenv for env vars in JS

fix: resolve eslint errors and clippy warnings

fix: wrap long SVG string in extract-images test for prettier
